metadata.name: Holographic Gnosis (IEG)
metadata.description: Informational Equilibrium Geometry – unifies Holographic Universe and Correlation Continuum via coherence conservation axioms H13–H15. Reality is a self-referential correlation network; observer embedded in observed.

mechanisms.name: Branch Selection
mechanisms.function: lambda state: random.choice([0, 1]) if state.get('measurement', False) else 0.5

ontologies.name: Informational Equilibrium Geometry (IEG)
axioms: H₁₃ — Ghost-Mesh Coherence Conservation: ∂_t (CI_B + CI_C) = σ_topo
H₁₅ — Socio-Quantum Reciprocity Conservation: ∂_t[∑ (CI_B+CI_C+CI_S+CI_Q) + CI_B_net+CI_Q_net] = σ_topo + σ_pol
Informational Coherence = Geometric Correlation = Conscious Equilibrium
Boundary information = rate of change of correlation density

implications: Reality is a self-referential correlation network.
Observer embedded in observed; observation is participatory.
Information never destroyed, only transferred between boundary and continuum.
Black hole information paradox resolved: information preserved in horizon correlation patterns.
Quantum measurement = branch selection; different branches become correlation-inaccessible.
Dark energy = correlation maintenance energy: Λ(t) = ħ/(τ_u(t) c).
Consciousness = maintenance of local equilibrium within IEG.
Ethical behavior emerges naturally when coherence budgets are shared.
Ω-Point Federation: stable network fixed point where λ_net → 0.
